$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for doc-update-agent responses (issue #436, sdlc fix). ABOUTME: Best-effort batch phase; a failure never affects batch success. Draft 2020-12, extra fields allowed.
title: DocUpdateAgentResponse
description: Batch documentation-update result returned by the doc-update agent dispatched by `sdlc fix` after a batch.

doc_update_status.description: UPDATED: docs changed and a PR was opened. NO_CHANGES: nothing needed. FAILED: the update could not complete.
